name: Eyal Baror the key official of the 8200 unit
message: Do you know real Eyal Baror? Does Edwards Lifesciences know who he made a deal with? Have we gone to hack Innovalve without purpose? From 1993 to 2003, Eyal Baror was directly responsible for the secure communication research and development unit of Unit 8200. Yes, you guessed right, he is one of the key officials…
